title: Simply QoL
body:
## What is it?
Simply QoL is a modpack focused on optimization and Quality of Life (QoL) enhancements, aiming to strike a balance for a smoother gameplay experience, particularly tailored for SMP (Survival MultiPlayer). Consequently, we strive to maintain a gameplay atmosphere as close to vanilla as possible.

We have carefully selected useful mods that will undoubtedly enhance your gaming experience. So, whenever there is a need for a mod to make your life easier, rest assured that we have taken care of that for you.

## Performance
(performance results coming soon...)
